creator: eugene@zhegan.in
text:
I get tonns of "error on subcontainer 'swrun container' insert (-1)" messages.

Being ran with -DALL I can see this:

===Cut===
trace: netsnmp_binary_array_insert(): container_binary_array.c, 403:
container: not inserting duplicate key
error on subcontainer 'swrun container' insert (-1)
===Cut===

I've read in maillist that this can be somehow connected to the network interfaces, so just in case I'm including my ifconfig output:

[emz@elf:/var/log]# ifconfig
fxp0: flags=8802<BROADCAST,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=4219b<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,WOL_MAGIC,VLAN_HWTSO>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:a4
        media: Ethernet autoselect (none)
        status: no carrier
em0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=209b<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,VLAN_HWCSUM,WOL_MAGIC>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:7596%em0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x2 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
plip0: flags=8810<POINTOPOINT,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
lo0: flags=8049<UP,LOOPBACK,RUNNING,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 16384
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        inet 127.0.0.1 netmask 0xff000000 
        inet6 ::1 prefixlen 128 
        inet6 fe80::1%lo0 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x4 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
pflog0: flags=141<UP,RUNNING,PROMISC> metric 0 mtu 33200
pfsync0: flags=0<> metric 0 mtu 1460
        syncpeer: 224.0.0.240 maxupd: 128
vlan1: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet 192.168.3.10 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.168.3.255
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan1 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x7 
        inet6 fd00::30a prefixlen 120 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 1 parent interface: em0
vlan5: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet 192.168.4.14 netmask 0xffffff00 broadcast 192.168.4.255
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan5 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x8 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 5 parent interface: em0
vlan22: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet6 2001:470:1f09:14c0::2 prefixlen 120 
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan22 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0x9 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 22 parent interface: em0
vlan23: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet 128.127.144.4 netmask 0xffffffe0 broadcast 128.127.144.31
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan23 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0xa 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 23 parent interface: em0
vlan818: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet 86.109.196.6 netmask 0xfffffff0 broadcast 86.109.196.15
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan818 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0xb 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 818 parent interface: em0
vlan104: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 1500
        options=3<RXCSUM,TXCSUM>
        ether 00:02:b3:e9:75:96
        inet 89.250.210.68 netmask 0xfffffff8 broadcast 89.250.210.71
        inet6 fe80::202:b3ff:fee9:75a4%vlan104 prefixlen 64 scopeid 0xc 
        nd6 options=3<PERFORMNUD,ACCEPT_RTADV>
        media: Ethernet autoselect (1000baseT <full-duplex>)
        status: active
        vlan: 104 parent interface: em0

How-To-Repeat: Install net-mgmt/net-snmp port.
